title: Document Tailwind CLI fallback strategy in IW AI Core Tech Stack docs

steps.description: Add 'Tailwind CLI fallback strategy' subsection under §2.4 Dashboard of docs/IW_AI_Core_Tech_Stack.md, update the 'Why Tailwind CSS via CDN' prose so it stops implying CLI compilation is reliable, and update §10 Decisions Log to reference the fallback. Documentation-only edit. Cite I-00067 by ID, do NOT cite worktree log paths.

Per-agent review of S01: factual accuracy vs. Makefile + dashboard/static/* layout; AC1–AC5 satisfied; exactly one source file changed (docs/IW_AI_Core_Tech_Stack.md); no Markdown breakage; tone matches surrounding doc.

Global cross-agent review across S01: diff completeness vs. design and functional docs; internal consistency between §2.4 Dashboard, §6 Makefile, and §10 Decisions Log; full unit + integration suite passes (no non-doc edits leaked).
Self-assessment of the just-completed item via the iw-item-analyze skill
